message:
fix(vcr): validate cassette version on load and reject mismatches

Adds version validation to load_cassette() so that cassette files
recorded with a different CASSETTE_VERSION are rejected with a clear
error message instead of being silently loaded and potentially causing
confusing replay failures.

Previously, load_cassette() deserialized the JSON and returned the
Cassette without checking its version field. If the cassette format
evolved (new fields, changed semantics), stale cassettes would load
successfully but produce incorrect or incomplete replay behavior with
no indication of the root cause. Now, after deserialization, the
version field is compared against CASSETTE_VERSION and a config error
is returned on mismatch, including both the found and expected versions
in the error message.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
